text: Hello, I am experiencing a rather perplexing issue with your application. It seems that every time I try to log in, it just doesn’t respond as expected, and I can't quite recall the exact error message, but I feel like I've tried everything from resetting my password to uninstalling and reinstalling the app, yet nothing seems to be working. It's quite frustrating because I need access for an urgent task. Any assistance would be greatly appreciated!
I'm so frustrated! My app keeps crashing whenever I try to open it. It's really upsetting because I rely on it every day!
I can't log in. My password, um, not working? And I don't remember my username. Help!
I'm really frustrated! My app crashes every time I try to open it, but it worked fine a minute ago! What's going on?

I’m just really confused about how your subscription tiers work. Can you please help me understand what makes the pro tier different from the business one? I feel overwhelmed and really want to make the right choice!
Could you please clarify the specific criteria for the eligibility of your premium service subscription?

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the service I have received. My order was supposed to arrive last week, yet I have not received any updates or tracking information. This delay is quite troubling and has disrupted my plans.
I cancel my subscription, but I got charged again? pls refund it.
I am experiencing some trouble accessing my account. It seems that there might be an issue, but I'm not entirely sure what it is. Could you please assist me with this matter?

I received my order last week, but to my surprise, the package was not what I expected at all! I thought I was getting a different item based on the description. It's been a bit disappointing because I've been looking forward to this for so long and now I'm left confused about what to do next. Can someone please help me figure this out? Thank you!
hey, i got charged for the wrong plan :( was it monthly, no, it was annuall, can u help?
I want to know if I can change my order, but also I never placed one, right?
My app crashes when I try to open it, but it also works fine sometimes. What’s going on?
I can't log into my account. It says my password is wrong.

I honestly don’t even know what’s going on with my account anymore. Like, I thought everything was fine, but then I got this weird notification that my account is locked? And it’s so confusing because I just used it yesterday and had no issues! Can someone please help me figure this out? I can’t believe I’m in this situation right now, when I thought I was all set. It’s just really frustrating and I’m not sure what steps to take next, especially if I have to verify anything because I’m not sure I even remember the answers to security questions correctly. Ugh.
I recently updated my email address in my account settings, but I still receive notifications at my old email. Could you clarify which email will be used for future communications, please?
